name: v0.1.6
body:
## What's Changed

- Suggest skills instead of auto-activating
- Fix Windows mouse scrolling (use WithMouseAllMotion)
- Rename AGENTS.md to deepact.md
- Add Ctrl+Enter as primary newline key on Windows
- Fix paste prefix truncated for CJK text
- Change paste indicator to [Pasted +N lines] format
- Remove BUILD_RESULT.txt and BUILD_VERIFICATION.md
